sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n75855" key="ou)lopoio/s" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">οὐλο-ποιός</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">όν</itype>, in neut. pl. <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">-ποιά, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">τά</gen></foreign>, <sense id="n75855.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">preparations to make the hair curl</tr_>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0715.tlg001:3:2" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Paul.Aeg.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">3.2</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
